combined_text: Young Katrina Victim Captured in Iconic Image Now Settled in Houston "Young Katrina Victim Captured in Iconic Image Now Settled in Houston By ALICE MAGGINAug. 27, 2010ABCNEWS.com WATCH Katrina: Mama Nita Five Years Later Email Tanisha Belvin is thriving in Houston. The 10-year-old is getting good grades and making lots of friends -- but she has not forgotten August 2
